Thanks for contributing to NBackup! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first.
Keep changes focused and follow the layering rules in ARCHITECTURE.md.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" -->

## Verification

<!-- Confirm the checks from CONTRIBUTING.md pass: -->

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (README / ARCHITECTURE / PRD)

## DCO sign-off

- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`) per the
      [Developer Certificate of Origin](https://developercertificate.org/)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, areas to scrutinize. -->
